findings.description: s3 (提供パッケージ) is missing hints for two of the three listed packages: 'please.change.me.core.dataformat.convertor' and 'please.change.me.test.core.file'. Only 'please.change.me.core.dataformat' is included.
findings.source_evidence: 提供パッケージ section lists three packages: please.change.me.core.dataformat, please.change.me.core.dataformat.convertor, please.change.me.test.core.file

findings.description: s8 (フィールドタイプ・フィールドコンバータ定義一覧) is missing hint 'リテラル値', which is the first-column converter name in the field converter table.
findings.source_evidence: フィールドコンバータ table first column lists: リテラル値, number, signed_number — only number and signed_number appear in hints
